subcodes.first_line: Blessed is he who hath arisen in My proximity, attained unto My tender mercies, and quaffed the pure wine of My bounty which was sealed in eternity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی لمن اصبح فی جواری و فاز بعنایتی و شرب رحیق عطائی الذی کان مختوما فی ازل
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @chastisement and requital, @rejection, opposition and persecution
